name: 折叠刀（★） | 自由之手
descriptionEn: Flip knives sport a Persian-style back-swept blade with an acute point. While the point itself may be fragile, the overall design of the flip knife's design is surprisingly durable. It has been painted black and purple, then decorated with a metallic marker.
descriptionZh: 具有波斯风格的折叠刀有着锋利的后弯刀片。虽然刀的尖端较易破碎，但从折叠刀的整体设计来看，它出奇的耐用。 这件武器有黑色与紫色的涂装，再使用金属符号装饰。
